name: Kaimana Shave Ice
tagline: All-natural fruit syrups with half the sugar and scratch-made ice cream — Haleiwa's gourmet contender to Matsumoto.
mustOrder: Any flavor with homemade mac nut ice cream — the signature combo
Liliko'i or mandarin — the tropical fruit syrups shine
Coffee flavor — unique and surprisingly good
parking: Street parking along Kamehameha Hwy in Haleiwa town
talkStory: Opened in 2018 by a young couple passionate about clean ingredients, Kaimana quickly became the health-conscious alternative to Matsumoto's artificial syrups. All fruit syrups are made from scratch with about half the sugar of conventional shave ice, and you can actually taste the real fruit. The ice cream is churned daily on-site -- the macadamia nut flavor is a standout you won't find elsewhere. Only one size offered because they believe in doing one thing perfectly.
